tools.name: acoustic_fembem_linear_magnet_artifact_gate
tools.title: Linear Magnet Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates an attach-only shared MATLAB replay of a source-native P1 triangle magnetostatic example, including path/UI-only migration, unchanged mesh and boundary conditions, fieldwise linear scaling, quadratic energy scaling, and preserved Java bridge.

summary_json.description: Compact JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session linear magnet scaling run.
